## RiskIntelligenceOptions interface

Options for configuring a Risk Intelligence request.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface RiskIntelligenceOptions 
```

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [apiEndpoint?](./sdk.riskintelligenceoptions.apiendpoint.md) |  | [APIEndpoint](./sdk.apiendpoint.md) | _(Optional)_ A custom endpoint from which the agent is loaded and to which Risk Intelligence requests are made. |
|  [bypassCache?](./sdk.riskintelligenceoptions.bypasscache.md) |  | boolean | _(Optional)_ Whether to bypass the token cache and force the request of a new token from the API. |
|  [sitekey](./sdk.riskintelligenceoptions.sitekey.md) |  | string | Sitekey of your application, starts with <code>FC</code>. |
